name: Evelyn Sterling
subject: My Late Grandmother
content:
Evelyn was a force of nature, a woman who lived through the changing tides of the 20th century with a silent, unwavering grace. Born in a small coastal town in 1928, she grew up listening to the rhythm of the waves, a rhythm that stayed with her throughout her long and storied life.

She was known for her collection of antique clocks and her ability to make anyone feel like the most important person in the room. Her kitchen always smelled of rosemary and warm bread, a sanctuary for anyone who needed a moment of peace.
